message.content:
@startuml
participant "User" as User
participant "HubSpot" as HubSpot
participant "TypeForm" as TypeForm
participant "TypeForm API" as TypeFormAPI
participant "Node App" as NodeApp
participant "AWS" as AWS

participant "S3 Bucket" as S3Bucket
participant "SES" as SES

User -> HubSpot: Loads Compass
HubSpot -> TypeForm: Generate UUID to identify user
TypeForm -> HubSpot: Load embedded TypeForm survey
User -> HubSpot: Completes survey
TypeForm -> HubSpot: Redirects to HubSpot Landing Page Submission Form
HubSpot -> TypeForm: https://info.codurance.com/en/compass-details-submission
TypeForm -> HubSpot: Redirects to /report/submit/:uuid (to generate report)
HubSpot -> NodeApp: Start report generation
NodeApp -> HubSpot: Redirects to HubSpot Thanks Landing Page
HubSpot -> NodeApp: https://info.codurance.com/en/compass-successful-submission
NodeApp -> TypeFormAPI: Gets survery questions & answers
TypeFormAPI -> NodeApp: Get user details
NodeApp -> HubSpot: generate report and send email
NodeApp -> S3Bucket: Build report and render with jsreport
NodeApp -> S3Bucket: Upload report to AWS S3 bucket
NodeApp -> S3Bucket: Query report link
NodeApp -> S3Bucket: Compose email data with report pdf link
NodeApp -> SES: Queue email for sending
NodeApp -> User: Send email to user

@enduml
